name: Ghost Flotilla
description: Strategic doctrine of utilizing hidden, temporary, and camouflaged bases to maintain strategic unpredictability and operational independence.

ghosting.description: Transform old, abandoned airship wrecks into temporary, camouflaged bases

nomadic_nature.description: Avoid established, controlled ports and maintain strategic unpredictability

denial_method: Refusing to concentrate forces or rely on fixed infrastructure
denial_effect: Denies larger, more conventional powers a viable target
